9:112:1.m: the people who turn back (from wrong)

9:112:2.m: the worshippers (part of list describing believers)

9:112:4.m: the ones who travel/journey (for worship) (part of list describing المؤمنين)

9:112:5.m: the ones who bow down in worship (part of a list describing true believers)

رَّاكِع: ones who bow down in worship
ُونَ: (part of a list describing true believers)

9:112:6.m: the ones who bow down in worship

سَّاجِد: ones who bow down in worship

9:112:7.m: the ones who command (part of a list describing true believers)

ونَ: (part of a list describing true believers)

9:112:8.m: with/by what is right (object of الْءَامِرُونَ - those who command)

9:112:15.m: and bring good news! (command to the Prophet ﷺ)

بَشِّرِ: bring good news! (command to the Prophet ﷺ)

9:113:8.m: for the ones who make partners (with Allah)

9:113:16.m: it became clear/evident (to لَهُمْ - to them)

9:113:18.m: that they (referring to أَصْحٰبُ ٱلْجَحِيمِ - companions of the Fire)

9:114:3.m: the seeking of forgiveness (subject of كَانَ)

9:114:8.m: a specific promise (that was made) (object of عَن)

9:114:9.m: he promised it (referring to مَّوْعِدَةٍ - a promise)

9:114:10.m: him (as direct object of وَعَدَ - he promised)

هُ: (as direct object of وَعَدَ - he promised)

9:114:14.m: that he (is عَدُوٌّ لِّلَّهِ - an enemy of Allah)

9:114:20.m: Abraham (as the subject of لَأَوَّاهٌ - 'indeed tender-hearted')

9:114:21.m: truly one who frequently turns to God (describing إِبْرٰهِيمَ)

أَوَّاه: one who frequently turns to God

9:115:2.m: he was (negated by ما before it)

9:115:4.m: in order to make (someone) lose their way (purpose of كَانَ)

9:115:9.m: until (connects to يُبَيِّنَ - he makes clear)

9:115:11.m: for them, to them (referring to قَوْمًۢا/people in this ayah)

9:115:13.m: they protect themselves (from what Allah has forbidden)

9:116:2.m: Allah (as the object being verified by إِنَّ)

َ: (as the object being verified by إِنَّ)

9:116:17.m: any helper/supporter (in a phrase like 'of any helper')

9:117:2.m: He definitely turned back (subject of اللَّهُ - referring to Allah accepting repentance)

9:117:15.m: that which (connects to كَادَ - was about to)

9:117:19.m: of a group (that belongs to them in قُلُوبُ فَرِيقٍ مِّنْهُمْ - hearts of a group among them)

9:117:22.m: he returned back (from wrong to right)

9:117:27.m: intensely merciful and kind (describing Allah in this ayah)

9:118:3.m: the ones who (subject of خُلِّفُوا - were left behind)

9:118:4.m: they were left behind (referring to الثَّلٰثَةِ - the three)

9:118:6.m: when (introduces the condition ضَاقَتْ - it became tight)

9:118:9.m: the earth (subject of ضَاقَتْ - became tight)

9:118:26.m: so that they may return back (from wrong)

9:118:28.m: Allah (as the object being referred to)

9:118:30.m: The Most Accepting of Repentance (a name/attribute of Allah)

9:118:31.m: The Most Merciful (one of Allah's names)

9:119:3.m: they believed (referring to الَّذِينَ - those who)

9:120:2.m: he was/existed (negated by مَا before it)

9:120:9.m: that (connects to يَتَخَلَّفُوا۟ - they stay behind)

9:120:10.m: they deliberately stay behind (subject of كَانَ)

9:120:28.m: in/within/at (location in سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ - the path of Allah)

9:120:35.m: the ones who constantly reject truth (as object of يَغِيظُ - angers)

9:120:40.m: any getting/obtaining (object of يَنَالُونَ - they obtain)

9:120:42.m: it was written (something that was recorded for them)

9:120:51.m: reward (object of يُضِيعُ - does not waste)

9:120:52.m: the ones who do good (object of يُضِيعُ)

9:121:2.m: they spend (referring to the believers in this ayah)

9:121:4.m: a small (feminine, describing the expenditure being spent)

9:121:6.m: big/large (describing something feminine being acted upon)

9:121:11.m: it was written (passive form of كَتَبَ)

9:122:4.m: in order that they go out

9:122:7.m: he went forth/rushed out (subject of لَوْلَا)

9:122:13.m: so that they seek deep understanding

9:123:2.m: the ones who (subject of يَلُونَكُم - they border you)

9:123:3.m: they believed (subject of يَلُونَكُم - those who are near you)

ا: (subject of يَلُونَكُم - those who are near you)

9:123:6.m: they are near to you all (referring to the believers being addressed in this ayah)

9:123:8.m: of the ones who constantly reject (truth) (follows مِنَ)

9:123:11.m: harshness (as the object of وَلْيَجِدُوا - let them find)

ةً: (as the object of وَلْيَجِدُوا - let them find)

9:123:14.m: Allah (as the object of اعْلَمُوا - know)

9:124:3.m: it was sent down (referring to سُورَةٌ/chapter)

9:124:14.m: they believed (referring to the believers mentioned earlier in the ayah)

ا۟: (referring to the believers mentioned earlier in the ayah)

9:125:2.m: Those who (refers to people being discussed)

9:125:9.m: their dirt/uncleanliness (connected to قُلُوبِهِم/their hearts in this ayah)

9:126:3.m: that they (are being tested in يُفْتَنُونَ)

9:126:7.m: a year (in كُلِّ عَامٍ - every year)

9:126:8.m: one time (followed by مَرَّتَيْنِ meaning 'two times')

9:127:3.m: it (referring to سُورَةٌ) was sent down

9:127:18.m: because they (are قَوْمٌ لَّا يَفْقَهُونَ - a people who do not understand)

9:128:2.m: he definitely came to you all

9:128:5.m: yourselves (referring to those being addressed in رَسُولٌ مِّنْ أَنفُسِكُمْ - a messenger from yourselves)

9:128:12.m: with/towards the believers (in relation to رَءُوفٌ - compassionate)

9:129:3.m: so/then say! (responding to إِن تَوَلَّوْا۟ - if they turn away)

9:129:7.m: any god (object of لَآ meaning 'there is no')

9:129:11.m: I put my complete trust (in عَلَيْهِ - in Him)

9:129:15.m: the great, the mighty (describes العَرْشِ - the throne, showing possession)
